claims.title: Claims
claims.no_claims_desc: Your claims will appear here when a disruption event is detected

squad.title: Dost Shield
squad.subtitle: Squad pooling for lower premiums
squad.no_squad: You're not in a squad yet
squad.invalid_invite_code: Please enter a valid 6-character invite code
squad.how_it_works_body:
• 5-10 workers from the same zone form a squad
• If no one files a claim in a week, everyone gets 10% premium cashback
• Cashback is credited every Monday with your payout
• Creates community accountability while reducing premiums

settings.title: Settings
settings.logout_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to log out?

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Get quick answers and contact our support team
help.faq_1_q: When will I get my payout?
help.faq_1_a: Approved payouts are usually credited within a few minutes. During heavy load, it may take up to 24 hours.
help.faq_2_q: Why is my claim under review?
help.faq_2_a: Some claims need extra checks for fraud prevention. You will get a notification as soon as review is complete.
help.faq_3_q: How can I lower my premium?
help.faq_3_a: Keep a strong SafeRider score and stay claim-free with your Dost Shield squad to unlock discounts and cashback.
help.chat_started: Live chat started. A support agent will join shortly.
help.chat_unavailable: Live chat is temporarily unavailable. Please call or email us.
help.about_body: KawaachAI protects delivery workers against weather and disruption risks with fast, fair, and transparent payouts.

stepup.info_text: This helps verify you are in the affected zone. Your WiFi scan data is used only for location verification.
